name: Smoked Salmon Bagel
tagline: Toasted everything bagel with cream cheese, smoked salmon, capers, red onion
highlight: Five toppings, ten minutes — Sunday brunch perfection

hero.alt: Smoked salmon bagel with cream cheese and capers
hero.caption: lox bagel — deli sunday

healthFacts: Cold-smoked salmon retains omega-3s while adding gut-friendly cure flavors.
Pickled red onion adds digestive enzymes and bright acidity.

steps.title: Toast bagels
steps.detail: Halve and toast bagels until golden but still soft inside.
steps.tip: Over-toasted bagel = scratchy palate. Aim gold, not brown.

steps.title: Schmear cream cheese
steps.detail: Spread cream cheese generously on each warm half — heat softens it for clean spreading.
steps.tip: Cream cheese taken out of the fridge 15 min ahead spreads way easier.

steps.title: Layer toppings
steps.detail: Layer tomato slices, then drape salmon, then onion, then capers, dill, fresh pepper.
steps.tip: Don't over-stack — bagel sandwiches are open-faced for a reason.

steps.title: Squeeze and serve
steps.detail: Squeeze fresh lemon over the top. Serve open-faced or close it to take to-go.
steps.tip: A drizzle of olive oil over makes it look café-photo-ready.
